title: The Bound Soul
subtitle: Prologue -- In the Eye of the Betrayal
author: Billy Williams
excerpt: Eight Winglords. One inn on the edge of the sky. And a betrayal written in lightning that will echo across a thousand years. The opening prologue of The Bound Soul -- Book One of the Winglord Saga.

title: The Winglord Saga
subtitle: Revised Edition -- Prologue and Chapter One
author: Billy Williams
excerpt: Seven Wing Lords. One ancient dragon. A betrayal written in lightning. The definitive revised opening arc of the Winglord Saga -- from the storm-battered inn to Toby's fateful morning.

title: Salvation
subtitle: A Poem
author: Billy Williams
excerpt: A descent and a reaching -- tugging and pulling, chains and darkness, and the moment grace arrives just before the void claims all.

title: Religion
subtitle: A Personal Reflection
author: Billy Williams
excerpt: A meditation on faith, judgment, and the space between belief and belonging. On using holy books as guides to kindness -- not weapons of division.

title: Why I Started Coding
subtitle: A Dev Journal Entry
author: Billy Williams
excerpt: I came to programming the way I came to PC building -- through curiosity and a need to understand how things work. Here's what I've learned so far and where I'm headed.
